CustomField.description: When checked, marks this grid as manually reviewed and bypasses it from the automated Grid Review alert. Checking this field clears the Next Review Date. Setting a Next Review Date automatically unchecks this field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box to mark the grid as reviewed and exclude it from the next scheduled review alert. Setting a new Next Review Date will automatically uncheck this box.
CustomField.label: Grid is Reviewed
